title: SQLite Default Storage Design
summary: Design rationale for making SQLite the default storage backend and moving DuckDB to a separate binary.
notes: Design/plan doc with a 'Design Decisions' table and rationale (ADR-like signals), but lacks ADR formal structure (no Context/Decision/Consequences, Status is 'IMPLEMENTED' not 'Accepted'). Prose+tables describing implementation approach; classified DOC over ADR/SPEC given plan-document format and historical/implemented status.
